data.title: Galaxy Digital Debuts on Nasdaq with Ticker GLXY
data.description: According to Foresight News, Galaxy Digital has officially listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol GLXY. This marks a significant milestone for the company as it expands its presence in the financial markets.

data.title: New Zealand man arrested for involvement in $265 million cryptocurrency scam
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: New Zealand police issued an announcement announcing that a Wellington man was arrested in Auckland for allegedly participating in a global cryptocurrency fraud operation led by the FBI. The criminal group stole $265 million (NZ$450 million) worth of cryptocurrency from seven victims and then laundered the money through multiple platforms between March and August 2024. New Zealand police said that in the past three days, search warrants have been executed in Auckland, Wellington and California, and several people have been arrested, one of whom is in New Zealand. A total of 13 people face charges. The U.S. Department of Justice has filed an indictment against the Wellington man under U.S. federal law, accusing him of racketeering (RICO), conspiracy to commit wire fraud, and conspiracy to commit money laundering. The man appeared in the Auckland District Court today and was temporarily banned from revealing his name. He has now been released on bail. He will appear in the Auckland District Court again on July 3, 2025. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Fidelity Reports Significant Net Inflows for FBTC and FETH
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors monitoring revealed substantial net inflows for Fidelity's FBTC and FETH on May 16. FBTC saw a net inflow of $67.9 million, while FETH experienced a net inflow of $13.6 million. These figures indicate strong investor interest and activity in these financial products.

data.title: Grayscale Executes Significant Bitcoin Transaction Worth $674 Million
data.description: According to Odaily, Arkham monitoring has reported a substantial Bitcoin transaction involving Grayscale. Approximately 10 hours ago, a total of around 6,500 BTC were transferred out of the Grayscale Bitcoin Trust. The transaction is valued at approximately $674.05 million.

data.title: Judge Tosses SEC-Ripple Settlement: Court Battle to Continue
data.description:
A judge has decided to reject the proposed settlement between the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and Ripple Labs, indicating that the ongoing legal battle regarding the classification of Ripple’s cryptocurrency, XRP, will persist and continue in the courts.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/news/judge-tosses-sec-ripple-settlement-court-battle-to-continue

data.title: Binance Selects $REX (Revox) as 59th Spotlight Project in Binance Alpha
data.description: Binance has officially announced $REX (Revox) as the 59th Spotlight Project featured in its prestigious Binance Alpha program. The selection highlights Revox's innovative role in the AI and Web3 landscape.

data.title: Binance Launches $1.7M SUI Ecosystem Trading Competition on Binance Alpha
data.description: Binance has introduced a new SUI Ecosystem trading competition on its Binance Alpha platform, offering approximately $1.7 million worth of rewards in SUI-related tokens. The competition runs from May 16 to May 30, 2025, with participants ranked based on their cumulative trading volume across selected token pairs.SUI Ecosystem Trading Rewards StructureThe initiative is designed to incentivize activity within the SUI Ecosystem, featuring six token-specific reward pools. Traders who meet volume thresholds will receive a fixed share of token rewards, with eligibility restricted to transactions conducted via Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha.TokenEligible UsersTotal Reward PoolTokens Per WinnerSCATop 3,0001,248,000 SCA416 SCABLUETop 8,0005,000,000 BLUE625 BLUENAVXTop 5,0005,000,000 NAVX1,000 NAVXHIPPOTop 2,00050,000,000 HIPPO25,000 HIPPONSTop 4,0001,000,000 NS250 NSSUITop 4,00060,000 SUI15 SUI Users can be eligible to receive rewards from more than one pool, provided they fulfill the trading requirements for each token category.Eligibility and Qualified Trading ActivityTo qualify, participants must trade eligible SUI Ecosystem token pairs within the promotion window. Only transactions executed using Binance Wallet (Keyless) or directly on Binance Alpha will be counted. Trades involving SUI/USDC or other SUI-stablecoin pairs are excluded, as are token bridging activities and third-party decentralized applications.The rewards distribution is scheduled for completion by June 13, 2025, and will be credited to eligible users’ Binance Alpha accounts. Each user's reward allocation will be capped according to the specified distribution per token pool.

data.title: New Zealand Man Arrested in Global Cryptocurrency Fraud Case
data.description:
According to PANews, a Wellington man has been arrested in Auckland for his alleged involvement in a global cryptocurrency fraud operation led by the U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation. The criminal group reportedly stole $265 million worth of cryptocurrency from seven victims and laundered the funds through various platforms between March and August 2024.

New Zealand police stated that search warrants were executed over the past three days in Auckland, Wellington, and California, resulting in several arrests, including one in New Zealand. A total of 13 individuals face charges. The U.S. Department of Justice has charged the Wellington man under U.S. federal law with racketeering (RICO), conspiracy to commit wire fraud, and conspiracy to commit money laundering. He appeared in Auckland District Court today, where he was granted bail and temporarily prohibited from being named. He is scheduled to reappear in court on July 3, 2025.

Previously, the U.S. Department of Justice indicted 12 suspects involved in a $263 million cryptocurrency crime, accusing them of participating in a criminal network organized by ringleader Malone Lam. The group used social engineering scams, database intrusions, and physical theft of hardware wallets to commit their crimes. Lam is personally accused of a single fraud amounting to $230 million. Ten defendants have been arrested, while two accomplices in Dubai remain at large. The indictment reveals the group's roles included target selection, phone scams, money laundering, and physical theft. Lam allegedly remotely monitored victims' iCloud data and directed accomplices to commit burglaries. Records from August 2024 indicate the group stole 4,100 bitcoins, valued at $385.4 million at the time, through peer-to-peer scams.

data.title: Billionaire Warren Buffett Dumps $3,230,000,000 of Berkshire’s Exposure To Citigroup, Bank of America and Capital One After Exiting Wells Fargo, JPMorgan Chase
data.description:
Billionaire Warren Buffett just sold about $3. 23 billion of Berkshire Hathaway’s stake in Citigroup, Bank of America and Capital One. After eliminating Berkshire Hathaway’s stake in JPMorgan Chase and Wells Fargo in recent years, new filings show Buffett continues to place US banks on the chopping block
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/17/warren-buffetts-berkshire-hathaway-dumps-3587192000-in-bank-of-america-and-capital-one-slashes-billion-dollar-stake-in-citigroup-to-zero/

data.title: Blockchain game Nyan Heroes announces it will cease operations
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to a post on the X platform by the blockchain game Nyan Heroes, due to the failure of the latest product to reach the expected user scale, coupled with the many challenges faced by the current Web3 market environment, it failed to obtain the financial support needed to maintain the operation of the studio, and finally decided to terminate operations.
It is reported that Nyan Heroes has received more than 250,000 player reservations on the Epic and Steam platforms, and four test activities have attracted more than 1 million players to participate. The game has been on the Epic Games popular and most played list many times, and has been reported by traditional media such as IGN, Business Insider and Game Rant.

data.title: TRUMP token holders: The actual cost of the Trump dinner is only the transaction fee, and the notification has been confirmed
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News TRUMP token holder Morten Christensen (finally ranked 188th on the list) said that he and four friends have confirmed that they will attend the dinner for Trump coin holders next week, and they will only spend about $1,200 each.
It is reported that the highest time-weighted holdings of these five people in the past three weeks ranked in the top 220. Although at least about $54,500 of time-weighted holdings were required during that period to participate in Trump’s event on May 22, Christensen and his friends believed that the actual amount spent was basically only transaction fees, that is, $1,200 per person. Their strategy was to buy Trump coins and short the exact same amount, and then immediately sold their Trump coins and closed their positions after the winners were announced on Monday. (WSJ)

data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew 1.79 trillion PEPE from Binance, worth $22.22 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet withdrew 1.79 trillion PEPE from Binance, worth US$22.22 million.

data.title: Binance and Kraken repel social-engineering hacks similar to Coinbase’s
data.description:
Binance and Kraken managed to guard against social engineering attacks similar to those launched on Coinbase.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/binance-and-kraken-repel-hacks/

data.title: Canaan Inc. Receives Nasdaq Compliance Notification
data.description: According to Odaily, Canaan Inc. received a written notice from the Nasdaq Stock Market on May 13, 2025, indicating non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). The notice stated that the closing price of the company's American Depositary Shares (ADS) had fallen below $1.00 per share for 30 consecutive business days. Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810(c)(3)(A), Canaan Inc. has been granted a compliance period of 180 calendar days, until November 10, 2025, to meet the minimum bid price requirement. To regain compliance, the closing price of its ADS must be at or above $1.00 per share for at least 10 consecutive business days within this period. The Nasdaq notification does not directly affect the listing or trading of the company's securities on the exchange.

data.title: Binance: Users with at least 196 Binance Alpha Points can claim 3,935 REX tokens airdrop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Alpha is now online on REVOX (REX). Eligible Binance users with at least 196 Binance Alpha points can claim an airdrop of 3,935 REX tokens on the Alpha event page starting at 15:00 (UTC+8) on May 17, 2025. Please note that claiming the REX airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha points. Users need to complete the claim within 24 hours after the claim is opened (that is, before 15:00 on May 18, 2025, Eastern Time 8), otherwise it will be deemed to have given up the airdrop.

data.title: Tether mints 16 billion USDT on Tron in 2025
data.description:
17-5-2025 – Tether Ltd. has orchestrated a substantial expansion of its USDT supply on the Tron network, minting an additional 16 billion tokens in 2025. This strategic manoeuvre has propelled Tron’s total USDT supply to 75. 7 billion, establishing its dominance over Ethereum’s network
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/tether-mints-16-billion-usdt-on-tron-in-2025/

data.title: White House Official Criticizes Effective Altruists' Approach to AI
data.description: According to Odaily, David Sacks, the White House's head of cryptocurrency and AI, expressed concerns on the X platform about the effective altruists' attempt to rebrand themselves following the SBF scandal. He noted that their efforts to position themselves as 'hawks' are undermined by their agenda to slow down technological progress, which could result in the United States falling behind in the global AI race.

data.title: Nasdaq notifies Canaan Technology that it must meet the minimum purchase price requirement within 180 days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Canaan Technology received a written notice from the Nasdaq Stock Market on May 13, 2025, stating that the company did not comply with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550 (a) (2) because the closing price of its American depositary shares was less than US$1.00 per share for the past 30 consecutive business days. According to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810 (c) (3) (A), Canaan Technology is allowed to re-comply with the minimum purchase price requirement within the 180-calendar-day compliance period (i.e. before November 10, 2025), that is, the closing price of its American depositary receipts must reach or exceed US$1.00 per share for at least 10 consecutive business days within the 180-calendar-day compliance period. It is reported that Nasdaq's notification letter has no direct impact on the listing or trading of the company's securities on Nasdaq. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Gate Alpha is now online REX(REX)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate Alpha is now listed on REX (REX), and you can trade by entering the APP.
Gate Alpha now supports public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in the spot account to directly purchase on-chain assets without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.
